title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Super Soft Plain Dyed Diamond Flat Sheet [ Double - White ]
features: ARRAY OF SIZES AND STYLES: Whatever your bed size, you can find the perfect fit from among our new diamond range flat sheet double size.

SOFT AND SMOOTH MATERIAL: The exquisite bedding double flat sheet of sumptuous poly cotton fabric slide smoothly over your skin as you shift in your slumber, allowing you to get the rest you deserve night after night.

STAY WARM AND COSY: These expertly manufactured double flat sheets are designed to help keep you resting comfortably at the ideal temperature throughout the night by keeping heat close to your skin while avoiding overheating.
EASY WASH BED SHEETS DOUBLE SIZE: It could not be simpler to care for these easy-care 50% cotton, 50% polyester double bedding bed sheets in the convenience of your own home.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
